creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
Please update ports net/activemq up to 5.4.1.

Port changes:

* New start/status/stop logic for rc.d script (derived from www/tomcat6)

Thanks a lot!

Fix: Please review patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/activemq && make install
